_comment: Equipment / analysis upgrades purchased with research points (spec section 15). These unlock deeper ABSTRACT analysis tools and bigger experiments — never real lab methods. 'requires' lists prerequisite equipment ids.

equipment.name: Advanced statistics suite
equipment.description: Adds extra histogram traits and finer distribution analysis on the Statistics screen.

equipment.name: High-throughput crosser
equipment.description: Run crosses of up to 1000 offspring for sharper ratios.

equipment.name: Long-term culture chamber
equipment.description: Run population experiments up to 20 generations.

equipment.name: Carrier scanner
equipment.description: Reveal hidden genotypes (including heterozygous carriers) in the vial fly list.

equipment.name: Automated batch crosses
equipment.description: Cheaper breeding: reduces the supply cost of each cross.
